hero.headline: Themadhood's Stained Glass
body: Themadhood's Stained Glass is the stained glass division within Themadhood's Goods, focused on producing decorative panels, themed designs, and limited handcrafted works while maintaining the visual style and themes associated with Themadhood.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: Themadhood's Stained Glass operates as both an independent creative workshop. Its purpose is to design and produce stained glass pieces that reflect the themes, ideas, and visual identity developed across Themadhood projects.

Through decorative panels, themed designs, and limited handcrafted works, Themadhood's Stained Glass provides a framework for organizing glass creations while allowing each line of designs to develop its own style and focus. This structure ensures that goods remain connected to the broader creative ecosystem while still supporting unique craftsmanship and experimentation.

items.title: Custom Stained Glass Design
items.body: Development of original stained glass pieces from concept through finalized design. Each project focuses on composition, color balance, and structural layout to ensure both visual impact and long-term durability.

items.title: Handcrafted Glass Fabrication
items.body: Creation of stained glass works using traditional cutting, fitting, and assembly techniques. Care is taken to maintain clean lines, structural strength, and precise alignment throughout the construction process.

items.title: Decorative Panels & Displays
items.body: Production of decorative glass panels and display pieces designed for artistic presentation. These works emphasize color interaction, light diffusion, and cohesive visual design.

items.title: Themed Glass Collections
items.body: Development of limited stained glass sets built around specific creative themes. These collections allow new designs and techniques to be explored while maintaining a consistent visual identity within Themadhood's Goods.
